_README: Tape-measure 3-5 real products by hand and add their true dimensions in cm below, keyed by the exact subject_id used in measurement_extraction_step/measurement_extraction.py (the SUBJECT_ID constant). Use null for any dimension not physically measured (e.g. depth, which needs a side-view capture). Delete the _README and _example_do_not_use keys once real entries are added below -- any key starting with an underscore is ignored by accuracy_validation.py.
